FLCore 2.6.30
  • Reference
  • Changelog

residuals

Source: R/FLQuant.R
residuals-FLQuant.Rd

residuals

Usage

# S4 method for class 'FLQuant'
residuals(object, fit, type = "log", ...)

Examples

data(ple4)
fit <- rlnorm(1, log(catch(ple4)), 0.1)
residuals(catch(ple4), fit)
#> An object of class "FLQuant"
#> , , unit = unique, season = all, area = unique
#> 
#>      year
#> age   1957     1958     1959     1960     1961     1962     1963     1964    
#>   all  0.07248 -0.01779 -0.09516 -0.09566 -0.06742 -0.04194  0.04796  0.09911
#>      year
#> age   1965     1966     1967     1968     1969     1970     1971     1972    
#>   all -0.16259 -0.00320 -0.06375  0.06731  0.13888  0.07722  0.04199 -0.02892
#>      year
#> age   1973     1974     1975     1976     1977     1978     1979     1980    
#>   all  0.12092  0.07705 -0.04056  0.02195 -0.08831 -0.02992  0.02317  0.08379
#>      year
#> age   1981     1982     1983     1984     1985     1986     1987     1988    
#>   all -0.01328  0.01242 -0.04609  0.08292 -0.01476 -0.11751  0.11581  0.00101
#>      year
#> age   1989     1990     1991     1992     1993     1994     1995     1996    
#>   all  0.04949 -0.09089  0.07807  0.01655  0.09007  0.00850 -0.14278  0.01872
#>      year
#> age   1997     1998     1999     2000     2001     2002     2003     2004    
#>   all -0.03532  0.07023 -0.14311  0.07309 -0.09676 -0.08863 -0.01858  0.01900
#>      year
#> age   2005     2006     2007     2008     2009     2010     2011     2012    
#>   all  0.02258 -0.04830 -0.10978 -0.15860  0.05156  0.02159  0.00635  0.10636
#>      year
#> age   2013     2014     2015     2016     2017    
#>   all -0.13064 -0.11370 -0.11003 -0.02336 -0.01538
#> 
#> units:  t 
residuals(catch(ple4), fit, type="student")
#> An object of class "FLQuant"
#> , , unit = unique, season = all, area = unique
#> 
#>      year
#> age   1957      1958      1959      1960      1961      1962      1963     
#>   all  0.375223  0.298250  0.176122  0.105450  0.109151  0.085518  0.050375
#>      year
#> age   1964      1965      1966      1967      1968      1969      1970     
#>   all  0.035582 -0.014787  0.000163 -0.001709  0.023011  0.047749  0.075860
#>      year
#> age   1971      1972      1973      1974      1975      1976      1977     
#>   all  0.047327  0.008865  0.024831  0.004175  0.005395  0.017940  0.011007
#>      year
#> age   1978      1979      1980      1981      1982      1983      1984     
#>   all  0.044491  0.009305  0.023227  0.072423  0.113089  0.440252  0.487595
#>      year
#> age   1985      1986      1987      1988      1989      1990      1991     
#>   all  1.242763  3.299113  3.369902  4.883378  2.915622  1.661964  0.328345
#>      year
#> age   1992      1993      1994      1995      1996      1997      1998     
#>   all  0.111967  0.004981  0.011000  0.021569  0.081105  0.003516 -0.002685
#>      year
#> age   1999      2000      2001      2002      2003      2004      2005     
#>   all  0.039450  0.036463  0.056502  0.007481  0.003274  0.046005  0.172127
#>      year
#> age   2006      2007      2008      2009      2010      2011      2012     
#>   all  0.158618  0.172001  0.101507  0.176660  0.148032  0.137390  0.107306
#>      year
#> age   2013      2014      2015      2016      2017     
#>   all  0.002043  0.010089  0.017886  0.069489  0.102082
#> 
#> units:   
rraw(catch(ple4), fit)
#> An object of class "FLQuant"
#> , , unit = unique, season = all, area = unique
#> 
#>      year
#> age   1957   1958   1959   1960   1961   1962   1963   1964   1965   1966  
#>   all   5479  -1593 -10501 -11843  -8337  -5410   6594  13921 -26732   -521
#>      year
#> age   1967   1968   1969   1970   1971   1972   1973   1974   1975   1976  
#>   all -10168   9752  18954  10153   5807  -4383  17257  11717  -6847   3819
#>      year
#> age   1977   1978   1979   1980   1981   1982   1983   1984   1985   1986  
#>   all -15312  -5411   3954  14845  -2467   2376 -10029  18164  -3673 -34818
#>      year
#> age   1987   1988   1989   1990   1991   1992   1993   1994   1995   1996  
#>   all  33735    319  14102 -23844  16386   3163  15467   1280 -20356   2443
#>      year
#> age   1997   1998   1999   2000   2001   2002   2003   2004   2005   2006  
#>   all  -5471  11614 -26257  10291 -13015 -13328  -2889   2635   2558  -5535
#>      year
#> age   2007   2008   2009   2010   2011   2012   2013   2014   2015   2016  
#>   all -12156 -19489   5815   2538    757  13305 -19686 -16829 -15975  -3102
#>      year
#> age   2017  
#>   all  -1936
#> 
#> units:  t 
rlogstandard(catch(ple4), fit)
#> An object of class "FLQuant"
#> , , unit = unique, season = all, area = unique
#> 
#>      year
#> age   1957    1958    1959    1960    1961    1962    1963    1964    1965   
#>   all  0.9237 -0.2267 -1.2127 -1.2192 -0.8592 -0.5345  0.6112  1.2631 -2.0721
#>      year
#> age   1966    1967    1968    1969    1970    1971    1972    1973    1974   
#>   all -0.0408 -0.8124  0.8578  1.7699  0.9841  0.5351 -0.3686  1.5411  0.9820
#>      year
#> age   1975    1976    1977    1978    1979    1980    1981    1982    1983   
#>   all -0.5169  0.2798 -1.1255 -0.3813  0.2953  1.0678 -0.1693  0.1583 -0.5874
#>      year
#> age   1984    1985    1986    1987    1988    1989    1990    1991    1992   
#>   all  1.0567 -0.1881 -1.4976  1.4760  0.0129  0.6308 -1.1583  0.9950  0.2109
#>      year
#> age   1993    1994    1995    1996    1997    1998    1999    2000    2001   
#>   all  1.1479  0.1083 -1.8197  0.2386 -0.4501  0.8951 -1.8238  0.9315 -1.2331
#>      year
#> age   2002    2003    2004    2005    2006    2007    2008    2009    2010   
#>   all -1.1296 -0.2368  0.2421  0.2878 -0.6155 -1.3990 -2.0212  0.6571  0.2752
#>      year
#> age   2011    2012    2013    2014    2015    2016    2017   
#>   all  0.0809  1.3554 -1.6649 -1.4491 -1.4023 -0.2978 -0.1960
#> 
#> units:   
rstandard(catch(ple4), fit)
#> An object of class "FLQuant"
#> , , unit = unique, season = all, area = unique
#> 
#>      year
#> age   1957 1958 1959 1960 1961 1962 1963 1964 1965 1966 1967 1968 1969 1970
#>   all 13.9 12.7 11.7 11.7 12.1 12.4 13.5 14.2 11.0 12.9 12.1 13.8 14.8 13.9
#>      year
#> age   1971 1972 1973 1974 1975 1976 1977 1978 1979 1980 1981 1982 1983 1984
#>   all 13.5 12.5 14.6 13.9 12.4 13.2 11.8 12.5 13.2 14.0 12.7 13.1 12.3 14.0
#>      year
#> age   1985 1986 1987 1988 1989 1990 1991 1992 1993 1994 1995 1996 1997 1998
#>   all 12.7 11.5 14.5 12.9 13.6 11.8 14.0 13.1 14.1 13.0 11.2 13.1 12.5 13.8
#>      year
#> age   1999 2000 2001 2002 2003 2004 2005 2006 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012
#>   all 11.2 13.9 11.7 11.8 12.7 13.2 13.2 12.3 11.6 11.0 13.6 13.2 13.0 14.4
#>      year
#> age   2013 2014 2015 2016 2017
#>   all 11.3 11.5 11.6 12.6 12.7
#> 
#> units:   
rstudent(catch(ple4), fit)
#> An object of class "FLQuant"
#> , , unit = unique, season = all, area = unique
#> 
#>      year
#> age   1957      1958      1959      1960      1961      1962      1963     
#>   all  0.375223  0.298250  0.176122  0.105450  0.109151  0.085518  0.050375
#>      year
#> age   1964      1965      1966      1967      1968      1969      1970     
#>   all  0.035582 -0.014787  0.000163 -0.001709  0.023011  0.047749  0.075860
#>      year
#> age   1971      1972      1973      1974      1975      1976      1977     
#>   all  0.047327  0.008865  0.024831  0.004175  0.005395  0.017940  0.011007
#>      year
#> age   1978      1979      1980      1981      1982      1983      1984     
#>   all  0.044491  0.009305  0.023227  0.072423  0.113089  0.440252  0.487595
#>      year
#> age   1985      1986      1987      1988      1989      1990      1991     
#>   all  1.242763  3.299113  3.369902  4.883378  2.915622  1.661964  0.328345
#>      year
#> age   1992      1993      1994      1995      1996      1997      1998     
#>   all  0.111967  0.004981  0.011000  0.021569  0.081105  0.003516 -0.002685
#>      year
#> age   1999      2000      2001      2002      2003      2004      2005     
#>   all  0.039450  0.036463  0.056502  0.007481  0.003274  0.046005  0.172127
#>      year
#> age   2006      2007      2008      2009      2010      2011      2012     
#>   all  0.158618  0.172001  0.101507  0.176660  0.148032  0.137390  0.107306
#>      year
#> age   2013      2014      2015      2016      2017     
#>   all  0.002043  0.010089  0.017886  0.069489  0.102082
#> 
#> units:
